{{/* Inner shortcode for {{< code-tabs >}}. Params: lang — language key for Chroma (default "text") filename — optional filename shown in header (default "") */}} {{ $lang := .Get "lang" | default "text" }} {{ $filename := .Get "filename" | default "" }} {{ $wrapperId := "" }} {{ $panelIndex := 0 }} {{ with .Parent }} {{ $wrapperId = .Scratch.Get "codeTabsWrapperId" | default "" }} {{ $panelIndex = .Scratch.Get "codeTabsPanelIndex" | default 0 }} {{ .Scratch.Set "codeTabsPanelIndex" (add $panelIndex 1) }} {{ end }} {{ $panelId := printf "%s-panel-%d" (cond (ne $wrapperId "") $wrapperId "ct") $panelIndex }}
{{ if $filename }}
{{ $filename }}
{{ end }} {{ highlight (trim .Inner "\n") $lang "" }}
